message.content:
I need to fix Storybook fonts to match the native app. Please research the following:

1. Find font files used by the project — check assets/fonts/, src/assets/fonts/, or any font references
2. Check the DS theme/token configuration for font families — look in node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app for theme tokens, fontFamily definitions
3. Check the current Storybook config at .storybook/preview.tsx and .storybook/main.ts for any existing font setup
4. Check if there's a .storybook/preview-head.html already
5. Check how the ThemeProvider from DS sets up fonts
6. Look at existing Storybook screenshots to understand current state: .storybook/screenshots/

Report all findings with exact file paths and relevant code snippets.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll research the font configuration across the project systematically. Let me start with multiple parallel searches.
